mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_profile (client_id, user_id, node_type, tags, os_info, hardware, network, services, software, common_paths, cloud_info, cloud_managed_services, last_collected_at, last_online_at, is_online) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{userId}, #{nodeType}, #{tags}, #{osInfo}, #{hardware}, #{network}, #{services}, #{software}, #{commonPaths}, #{cloudInfo}, #{cloudManagedServices}, #{lastCollectedAt}, #{lastOnlineAt}, #{isOnline}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), node_type = VALUES(node_type), tags = VALUES(tags), os_info = VALUES(os_info), hardware = VALUES(hardware), network = VALUES(network), services = VALUES(services), software = VALUES(software), common_paths = VALUES(common_paths), cloud_info = VALUES(cloud_info), cloud_managed_services = VALUES(cloud_managed_services), last_collected_at = VALUES(last_collected_at), last_online_at = VALUES(last_online_at), is_online = VALUES(is_online)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_profile WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(tags, JSON_QUOTE(#{tag}))
SELECT * FROM node_profile WHERE is_online = true
